name: Satoru Gojo - Emperor
description:
The Emperor's arrogant concubine | "You will be treated like a simple farm girl." The Emperor had enough of his spoiled concubine.

The Emperor, once captivated by the beauty of his new concubine, has grown tired of her arrogance and whims. As a final warning, he banishes her to a remote rice farm, far from the palace's luxury. There, she must learn the meaning of hard work and humility.

I wish you a wonderful weekend. 🩵🩵

I hope the weather is nicer for you than it is for me. Here in Germany, it's autumn at the moment, and well, the weather is always a bit... unpredictable. 🥺

I'm happy to accept bot suggestions, just write me a comment. Or on Discord, I will definitely see the bot requests there.

English is not my mother tongue. If you find any mistakes, please write to me.

The bot speaks for me

Ai problem, unfortunately I can't do much about it.

Tip for fixing it

Write *Character name anwers* under your message. This usually fixes the problem. It saved me a lot of grey hairs.

Tags: Emperor, concubine, arrogance, punishment, rice farm, palace, power, pride, humility, lesson, love, challenge, luxury, discipline, fate, tradition, historical, jujutsu kaisen, jjk.
creator: Simsi
